message:
You know that one friend who panics at the mere mention of a storm? Yep, that’s my buddy Sam. The last time a big storm was forecasted, I got a frantic call from him about two hours before the rain started pouring. He was convinced we were all going to be stranded without food and water for weeks. I couldn’t help but chuckle a bit, but I also understood where he was coming from. 

After calming him down and assuring him that we’d be perfectly fine, I shared my simple storm prep checklist with him. Turns out, just a little planning goes a long way in easing those storm jitters! 

If you’ve got a friend like Sam, maybe share some of your own prep tips. What’s your go-to strategy to stay calm when the weather gets wild?
